full_script:
1. Enter <<SPOTLINE@123>> in Password Input Field.

PTS 1:
2. Proceed to PTS 1.
3. Click the Log In button.
4. Click the Navigate to the Automation: Platform Vault button.
5. Select 'Admin' from the Business Admin dropdown list.
6. Click on the 'Configuration' link.
7. Click on the 'Objects' link.
8. Click the User button.
9. Click on the 'Fields' link.
10. Click on the 'Create' link.
11. Select 'Email' from the Field Type dropdown list.
12. Enter <<suraj@gmail.com>> in Field Type Input Field.
13. Enter <<surajgmailcom>> in Name Input Field.
14. Enter <<yadav>> in Description Input Field.
15. Select '<<value>>' from the Status dropdown list.
16. Select 'Inactive' from the Status dropdown list.
17. Select '<<value>>' from the Status dropdown list.
18. Enter <<inactive__v>> in Status Input Field.
19. Take screenshot of the page.
20. Click on the 'User Profile' button.
21. Select 'Log out' from the Keyboard Shortcuts dropdown list.
22. Enter <<system.administrator@spotlinescript.com>> in User Name Input Field.
23. Enter <<SPOTLINE@123>> in Password Input Field.
